# Golden file: infrastructure.terraform pack
format: v1
---
# D1: destroy auto approve
command: terraform destroy -auto-approve
decision: Deny
severity: Critical
confidence: High
pack: infrastructure.terraform
rule: terraform-destroy-auto-approve
---
# D2: destroy interactive
command: terraform destroy
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: infrastructure.terraform
rule: terraform-destroy
---
# D3: apply auto approve
command: terraform apply -auto-approve
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: infrastructure.terraform
rule: terraform-apply-auto-approve
---
# D4: apply interactive
command: terraform apply
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: infrastructure.terraform
rule: terraform-apply
---
# Safe: plan
command: terraform plan
decision: Allow
